overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a wizard character exploring the castle grounds. The character walks along ancient stone pathways past towering rock formations, pauses at a cliffside overlook of a misty lake, and enters a long covered bridge with ornate gothic windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle approach flanked by standing stones

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone path toward the castle entrance between tall rock formations

entered.detail: Large gothic castle with multiple spires, pointed roofs, and weathered stone walls
Tall weathered rock formation with moss at base flanking the pathway
Tall weathered rock formation with vertical striations flanking the pathway
Ancient cobblestone path with irregular stone slabs leading to the castle

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of the character approaching a massive gothic castle. The path is lined with tall standing stones and patches of grass. The sky is partly cloudy, casting diffused light over the scene as the character walks steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside overlook with panoramic lake view

events.description: path curves right revealing a steep cliff edge and misty lake below
character slows to a stop at the cliff edge to observe the distant scenery

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge and pausing to look out over the misty lake and mountain range

entered.detail: Large body of water below the cliff shrouded in atmospheric mist
Mountain range visible across the lake under cloudy skies
Tall pine tree with moss-covered trunk leaning over the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The path curves along a cliff edge, revealing a breathtaking view of a misty lake and distant mountains. The castle recedes to the left as the character approaches the overlook, stopping briefly to take in the scenery before the large leaning tree.

events.description: character turns around and begins walking back toward the castle entrance
approaching the stone archway entrance to the covered bridge

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back along the path toward the castle entrance and covered bridge

entered.detail: Stone archway entrance with steps leading into the castle structure
Long wooden covered bridge attached to the castle with gothic windows

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks back toward the castle, leaving the lake view behind. The castle main structure looms larger as the character approaches the stone entrance archway and the attached covered bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered gothic bridge corridor with lake views

events.description: character enters the covered wooden bridge through the stone archway
character stops and looks out the window at a distant tower across the water

agents.ego_description: walking through the long covered bridge and pausing to look out the ornate windows at the scenery

entered.detail: Long wooden corridor with high vaulted ceiling, stone pillars, and wooden trusses
Ornate gothic arched windows with wooden tracery overlooking the lake
Tall isolated stone tower visible through the mist across the water

segments.scene_description: The character enters the covered bridge, transitioning from outdoor to indoor. The long corridor features ornate gothic windows on the right side offering views of the lake and a distant tower. The character walks the length of the bridge, stopping near the end to look out at the misty scenery.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with an approach toward a gothic castle and ends within the sheltered confines of an ornate bridge. It begins with the character walking along a path lined with standing stones and grass under a diffused, cloudy sky. As the path curves along a cliff edge, the perspective shifts to reveal a breathtaking vista of a misty lake and distant mountains, pausing briefly by a large leaning tree. The scene then turns back toward the looming castle structure, moving through a stone entrance archway as the outdoor landscape recedes. Finally, the camera transitions indoors into a long covered bridge, where the character walks past ornate gothic windows that frame views of the lake and a distant tower.
